text: There was a man who loved donuts. Everyday after breakfast he would head down to the donut store. That place had everything. He liked cinnamon honey. He would always buy a dozen. Sometimes he got the monkey bars. Those things were fun. Once, an old lady had given him hers. They didn’t taste right. That night he dreamed he fell out. Something landed wrong. Then everything went white. When visions cleared, he was knee-deep in monkey bars. Luckily, an old lady was there. She scolded him. He remembered it didn’t taste right. That’s when he always bought hers. He liked her too.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
